title: Cardiff, Wales — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cardiff, Wales: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cardiff is a city in Wales with a population of 362,755. Wales’ capital offers a compact, affordable city with a growing media sector, a stunning waterfront, and easy access to nature.

Last updated: July 06, 2026
